title: Context Propagation, Deadlines, OS Signals, and Graceful Shutdown · Language Lens: Pokedex Go Root Signal Context
summary: Handlers create background contexts, Ctrl-C exits before cleanup, signal notifications are never stopped, blocked input and fetch work outlive the session, and cancellation is reported as failure. Predict the user decision, Go ownership, command state, API contract, resource budget, failure, and observable evidence before reading the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the pokedex go root signal context increment in signal-aware graceful command lifecycle. Learners progress throu…
objectives: Create one root context with signal.NotifyContext, call its stop function, and define portable interrupt behavior.
Keep recoverable command failures local, terminate on deliberate quit or unrecoverable lifecycle failure, and always clean up.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
